arts.ttl: Player ‘very much liked’ by Manchester United – Scouts sent multiple times
arts.sum: Fiorentina defender Pietro Comuzzo could be on his way out after contract renewal talks broke down, with Manchester United among the clubs linked with a move. According to Italian newspaper La Nazione (via TMW), the Red Devils are very keen on the player who Napoli previously tried to sign. arts.ttl: Manchester United squad vs Man City revealed as Ruben Amorim gets shock injury boost
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim looks set to be able to call upon the services of Luke Shaw for the clash with Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Five players who could join Man Utd this summer
arts.sum: A number of players are set to be sold by the Red Devils, including Marcus Rashford and Antony, while they are targeting several promising youngsters in a bid to bring long-term success back to Old Trafford. The Red Devils are actively looking to sign a new winger amid the imminent sales of Rashford and Antony, and Dibling is one of their key targets.
